goal: 补齐 Browser Harness debug bundle 产品切片

summary.title: 收口 Browser Harness debug bundle 产品链路
summary.what: 补齐 debug.bundle 产品 tool 与 runtime.capture_diagnostics 的 debug bundle 导出，记录 browser action lane map，并让普通 Chat context 保持 compact projection；同步收敛 Browser Harness 式少数原语、sidepanel stopped-state 展示、dogfood runners、文档/台账与 MCP->external 命名边界。新增 docs/workflows/2026-06-02-debug-bundle-closeout 作为 durable closeout 控制面，记录 T1/T2/T3/T4 handoff。
summary.why: 当前切片的核心目标是先把真实产品路径做成 debug-friendly：LLM/Agent 默认拿到小投影，需要完整证据时显式调用 debug_bundle / observability / artifact；避免继续扩大旧仓 UID/query/评分器/hidden verify/fallback 方向。用户要求先证明产品自己能在真实浏览器里完成诊断与 debug bundle 链路，再进入 commit/seal closeout。
summary.user_goal: 补齐 Browser Harness debug bundle 产品切片

decisions.point: 默认 browser automation 抽象
decisions.chose: 继续采用 Browser Harness 式少数原语和 Agent 自评：page_info、page_screenshot、click_xy、type_text、press_key、scroll、tabs 与显式 debug_bundle，而不是旧 UID/locator scoring 主线。
decisions.rationale: T1 MDN 产品 dogfood 证明 page_info + diagnostics + debug_bundle 足以完成只读观测链路；复杂评分器会把判断权重新塞回代码。
rejected: 恢复 UID-only page.click/page.fill 作为默认 Chat tool surface
引入 locator ranking、success heuristic、hidden verify 或 fallback tree

decisions.point: debug evidence 进入 LLM 的方式
decisions.chose: 普通 Chat/tool result 保持 compact projection；完整 lane map、timeline、raw tail、network、截图和 debug bundle 通过显式 debug/artifact/observability read 暴露。
decisions.rationale: 这些能力是给 LLM/Agent 使用的工具，但默认上下文不能塞 raw/full dump；显式读取能兼顾可调试性和上下文控制。
rejected: 把 raw DOM、完整截图 data URL、network dump、raw events 默认灌入每轮 Chat context
把 debug bundle 定义成人类专用 artifact

decisions.point: 真实 dogfood 证据边界
decisions.chose: 用 .ml-cache/dogfood/debug-bundle-mdn-t1-2026-06-02-rs1/ 作为 MDN 只读产品路径证明；X existing-profile 仍作为单独未通过边界，不用临时 profile 冒充。
decisions.rationale: 该 artifact 证明 product sidepanel/chat/kernel 路径完成 page_info -> runtime_capture_diagnostics -> debug_bundle -> final assistant response；X 需要同一真实 Chrome profile 中同时存在已登录 X tab 和本仓 MV3 sidepanel。
rejected: 把手动 Chrome 或临时 profile 结果算作 X existing-profile 产品通过
执行 like/post/reply/follow/DM/form-submit 等外部可见动作

decisions.chose: 把 int_a6221317、int_4ea34682、int_feb220c2 分类为同 actor / 同 codex/runtime-debug-dogfood lane 的前序或相邻 proposed work，并在 seal 中记录为非外部语义冲突。
decisions.rationale: T2 live readback 显示三者与当前 closeout 是递进关系：observability -> early product/X dogfood -> Browser Harness debug closure -> debug_bundle closeout；没有发现相互矛盾的行为要求。
rejected: 把这些 overlap 当成未知外部冲突直接停止

rejected.alternative: 继续扩 page.cdp/page.js/tabs.create/Skill Studio/MCP export 等新 breadth
rejected.reason: 当前 repo 处于 cutover delivery / debug bundle closeout，不应在真实产品 debug 链收口前打开新功能面。

rejected.alternative: 把 release:cutover:status 红色当成代码失败
rejected.reason: T3 证明 nested acceptance/build/smoke/check 均为绿色；红色原因是 dirty/ahead delivery state。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 保持少数原语 + Agent 判断；不新增评分器、hidden verify、fallback tree。
X existing-profile 未计入通过，且没有执行任何外部可见动作。
本轮只做本地 commit 和 Mainline seal；未 push、未开 PR、未 merge、未 release/deploy。

review_notes: 本轮 commit: ed68a9f feat(browser): 收口 debug bundle 产品链路。

T1 dogfood 通过: .ml-cache/dogfood/debug-bundle-mdn-t1-2026-06-02-rs1/，Timed out=false，Completion reason=assistant_text，runtime_capture_diagnostics 和 debug_bundle 均 succeeded，laneCount=4，toolCallCount=8，network failures=0。
T1 caveat: 默认 rs provider /responses 返回 403；最终通过使用配置里的 rs1 provider。
T2 overlap 分类: int_a6221317 是对话 observability 直接前序；int_4ea34682 是早期 X/fixture dogfood 前序，当前 closeout 保持只读边界；int_feb220c2 是 Browser Harness debug 闭环前序/相邻工作；三者不是外部语义冲突。

T3 验证通过: bun test apps/mv3-shell/test/runtime-chat.spec.ts；bun test apps/mv3-shell/test/manifest.spec.ts；bun test packages/kernel/test/llm-message-model.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/loop-engine.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/loop-orchestrator.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/prompt-builder.spec.ts；bun run typecheck；git diff --check；bun run check。
T3 cutover status: bun run release:cutover:status 退出 1，但 nested acceptance/build/smoke/check 绿色；失败原因是提交前 dirty/ahead delivery state。
提交前 git diff --cached --check 通过；提交后 worktree clean，main ahead origin/main 7 commits。
未 push、未开 PR、未 merge、未 release/deploy。

architectural_claims: Browser automation 默认主线是 Browser Harness 式少数强原语 + Agent/LLM 基于证据判断，不是 runtime-owned scoring/locator ranking/hidden recovery。
debug.bundle 是显式 LLM-callable deep-dive surface；普通 Chat context 保持 compact projection。
runtime.capture_diagnostics 可以导出 debug bundle refs/lane map/observability refs，而 full evidence 通过显式 artifact/resource/debug read 获取。
X existing-profile product dogfood 必须在同一真实 Chrome profile 中拥有已登录 X tab 与本仓 MV3 sidepanel，临时 profile 只能作为 diagnostic/control。
behavioral_changes: Default Chat tool surface excludes UID-only page.click/page.fill/page.query style old paths and keeps Browser Harness primitives plus runtime_capture_diagnostics/debug_bundle.
debug_bundle returns lane map and references for tool calls, observability timeline/raw tail, runtime history/audit, and artifacts without dumping raw evidence into ordinary context.
sidepanel state now treats blank non-done assistant.done terminal events as stopped/failed rather than successful final text.
dogfood runners can collect product task screenshot, sidepanel screenshot, chat bootstrap, debug bundle, network events, observability timeline, and raw tail.
MCP export wording in current product/docs/backlog was de-scoped to external export where appropriate.

api_changes.signature: debug.bundle / debug_bundle capability and tool projection
runtime.capture_diagnostics includes debug bundle refs/lane/debug resource references
runtime tool observability events include browserActionEvidence/lane/debug details while ordinary projections stay compact
bun run dogfood:real-browser and existing Chrome dogfood runner evidence output

security_implications: 普通 Chat context 不自动携带 raw DOM、raw events、完整截图 data URL 或 network dump。
dogfood reports record provider/model/baseUrl/api metadata but do not record bearer tokens. T1 notes rs provider 403 and rs1 success without exposing tokens.
existing-Chrome dogfood remains read-only by default and does not read cookies/localStorage/profile secrets/passwords; external visible X actions still require explicit user authorization.
migration_notes: 旧 UID-only page.click/page.fill/page.query pressure 被降级；后续若要保留必须由 dogfood 证明比少数原语组合更简单、更可调试。
MCP export backlog names已转为 external export 命名，避免把 MCP 当当前产品承诺。
release:cutover:status 下一次应在 push/PR 路径明确后重跑；本地 main 当前 ahead origin/main 7 commits。
